title: S L B TRANSIT INC ransomware incident

extortion.description: SLB TRANSIT IS A TRANSPORTATION COMPANY ESTABLISHED ON JANUARY 5, 2011. THE LETTERS SLB DENOTE THE THREE FOUNDING MEMBERS: S IS SERGE GAUDREAU, L IS LOUIS SIMARD AND B IS BERTRAND JOBAIN. THE GOAL IS TO CREATE A COMPANY THAT RELIES ON VALETS PAID AS A PERCENTAGE OF THE BILL.www.slbtransit.com
